name: Talons
description: The claws of these tactical bombs dig into the target and detonate on command.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: The claws of these tactical bombs dig into the target and detonate on command.

components.name: Control Module
components.description:
Autonomy processor for Robotics. A Corpus design.

Location: Europa, Neptune, and the Void

components.name: Ferrite
components.description:
Alloy pellets used in Grineer manufacturing.

Location: Mercury, Earth, Lua, Neptune, and the Void

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

components.name: Oxium
components.description:
Oxium is a rare lighter than air alloy of Orokin origin, used in certain Corpus Robotics.

Location: Venus, Jupiter, Mars, Neptune, Pluto, Eris, Europa, and Lua.

patchlogs.name: Update 32.2.0: Lua’s Prey
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Critical Chance and Status Chance stats not being listed for the Talons, Castanas, and Sancti Castanas in the Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.changes:
Talons
Fixed Garuda's Blending Talons Augment not triggering when hitting an enemy with Overguard is affected by a Slash Status Effect.
Talons

patchlogs.name: Echoes of the Zariman: Update 31.6
patchlogs.changes: Garuda’s Blending Talons augment

patchlogs.name: Zephyr & Chroma Prime Vault: Hotfix 31.5.10 + 31.5.10.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Garuda’s Seeking Talons HUD showing up when in Operator if cast while entering anti-Warframe area.

patchlogs.name: Zephyr & Chroma Prime Vault: Hotfix 31.5.8
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed script error related to Garuda’s Seeking Talons during Host migration.

patchlogs.name: Update 31.5: Angels of the Zariman
patchlogs.changes:
Tweaked Phoenix Talons:
Garuda’s Seeking Talons
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed script error related to Garuda’s Seeking Talons.

patchlogs.name: Garuda Prime: Hotfix 31.3.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed inability to use Garuda’s Talons if a Host migration occurred. 
Fixed Garuda Talons moving when hovering on/off color swatches in the Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: Garuda Prime: Update 31.3
patchlogs.changes: Her Talons also have increased base damage and Critical Chance stats.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Garuda Talons not retaining skin details/textures in Arsenal preview. 
Fixed Garuda's Seeking Talons UI getting stuck on screen after falling into a teleport volume while casting it.

patchlogs.name: Nora's Mix Volume 1: Update 31.2.0 + 31.2.0.1
patchlogs.changes:
Seeking Talons can now be charged without holding the cast binding for the entire duration. Either tap for a hands free charging that will auto release, or hold for manual charging. 
Added new Seeking Talons directional animations while being charged mid-air before releasing. 
Seeking Talons can now be charged while sprinting. 
Garuda is now invulnerable while casting Seeking Talons until it is fully charged.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Garuda’s Talons not retaining Skin details/textures outside of the Orbiter. As reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1240713-garuda-talon-skins-not-showing/#comment-11971610
Also fixed her Talons not retaining skin details/textures in the preview of Garuda in the Arsenal. 
Fixed previewing Garuda skins in the Arsenal not updating her Talons until you equip the skin.

patchlogs.name: Orphix Venom: Hotfix 29.6.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Garuda’s Blending Talons Augment Mod not hitting enemies behind you in the Range indicated.

patchlogs.name: Deimos: Arcana: Hotfix 29.5.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed ‘[PH] Mod Combo Count Chance’ appearing for Garuda’s Blending Talons Augment.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.changes: Tap to perform a *9m AoE around Garuda. Garuda’s Talons gain 100% additional Combo Count Chance when hitting targets affected by Bleed Status.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Gladiator Mods (Vice, Might, Rush) not stacking or applying the increased set bonus to Critical Chance per combo multiplier when they are applied to Garuda's Talons (only applies when Talons are the single equipped Melee).
Fixed Blood Rush and Weeping Wounds not applying to Garuda’s Talons (only applies when Talons are the single equipped Melee).

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix 29.0.8 + 29.0.8.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Garuda’s Talons not being visible on the End of Mission screen.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix 29.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed ragdolling enemies not taking additional Slash Status from being hit while debuffed by Garuda’s Seeking Talons.

patchlogs.name: The Steel Path: Update 28.1.0
patchlogs.changes: Valkyr Talons

patchlogs.name: Update 28: The Deadlock Protocol
patchlogs.changes: Slight reduction to Elemental FX on Garuda’s Talons.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Hotfix 27.4.3
patchlogs.changes: Stance Forma is now eligible to be installed on Garuda’s Talons due to the Talons using standard Stance Mods instead of an Exalted Stance.

patchlogs.name: Scarlet Spear: 27.3.13
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error related to Garuda’s Talons.

patchlogs.name: Operation: Scarlet Spear: 27.3.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed enemies marked by Garuda’s Seeking Talons not being prone to receiving a Slash Status Effect.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Hotfix 27.2.2
patchlogs.changes: Talons: 50%

patchlogs.name: Rising Tide: Update 26.1
patchlogs.changes:
Reduced Seeking Talons charge time by around 15%.
Increased Seeking Talons Status Chance from 50 to 75%.

patchlogs.name: Saint of Altra: Update 25.7.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Garuda’s Talons not using the proper textures for Clients with the Garuda Successor Skin equipped as per: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1077278-garuda-successor-talon-texture-defaulting-to-original-textures-as-client/

patchlogs.name: Wukong Prime: Hotfix 25.3.2 + 25.3.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a Host migration causing Garuda’s Talons to lose their Stance upgrade, and instead use the default attacks if it’s the only Melee weapon equipped.

patchlogs.name: Wukong Prime: Update 25.3.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed ‘Auto Installing’ Mods on Garuda's Talons with no Stance Mods resulting in 15 error popups.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon Remaster: Update 24.6.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Dispatch Overdrive not applying to Garuda’s Talons when equipped (this time without breaking all Arcanes).

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Hotfix 24.5.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Garuda Successor Skin not applying to her Talons.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.5.0
patchlogs.changes: Dispatch Overdrive now applies to Garuda’s Talons when equipped.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.4.0
patchlogs.changes: Dispatch Overdrive now applies to Garuda’s Talons when equipped.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.10
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed being able to equip Stance Mods in any slot and any Mod in the Stance slot for Garuda Talons and unequip Mods that break these rules.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.8
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Upgrade screen breaking for Garuda's Talons and Mesa's Regulators if you click the Mods button and back out.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.7 + 24.2.7.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Clients in the Simulacrum seeing Talons on other Warframes when Garuda is equipped and previewing others.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.1.3 + 24.1.3.1
patchlogs.changes:
Fixed delay between the end of Garuda's Seeking Talons release animation and being able to charge her Dread Mirror.
Fixed Seeking Talons not being cancelled by Stalker.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.1.2 + 24.1.2.1
patchlogs.changes:
Reduced total Seeking Talons charge time by 33%.
Seeking Talons charge now starts faster and slows down as it expands.
Increased minimum Seeking Talons charge size from 15 degrees to 25 degrees.
Reduced maximum Seeking Talons charge size from 120 degrees to 95 degrees.
Charging Seeking Talons while in the air will let you hover for a few seconds.
Charging Seeking Talons now makes a sound cue when fully charged.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.0.9
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Garuda’s Seeking Talons HUD indicator being incorrectly affected by HUD Scale.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.0.7
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Submersible Archwing disabling Garuda’s Talons.
Fixed Garuda's Talons not distinguishing the Stance slot when Polarizing/swapping.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.0.2
patchlogs.changes: Natural Talent Mod now applies to Garuda’s Dread Mirror and Seeking Talons ability.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Garuda’s Talons sometimes appearing motion blurred.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Update 23
patchlogs.changes:
Valkyr/Prime’s Talons
No customizing since her Talons’ design is all Energy-based!

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Update 22.20.0
patchlogs.changes:
Reduced the ammo pool of the Castanas family and Talons in Conclave. 
Increased the effect of gravity on the Castanas family and Talons in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.13.3
patchlogs.changes: Made the additional projectiles of Talons and Castanas from Multishot spread in a more uniform/predictable pattern.

patchlogs.name: Hydroid Prime: Update 21.6.0
patchlogs.changes: Increased the damage AoE radius of the Talons in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.4.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Castanas, Talons and Ogris projectiles being destroyed in flight doing 4x damage with 2x radius in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Update 20.5.0
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the detonation delay of detonated explosive weapons (Talons, Castanas, etc).

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20.1.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Valkyr continuing to have her Talons equipped after Hysteria is deactivated if a player was joining the game while the ability was being activated.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.changes: Azima, Euphona Prime, Kulstar, Pandero, Talons

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview
patchlogs.changes:
Increased damage of Talons in Conclave.
Talons now cause knock down in Conclave.
Maximum amount of deployed Talons reduced to 4 in Conclave.
Conclave Mod Heavy Warhead is no longer usable with Castanas or Talons.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.8.0
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed the Mutalist Cernos and Talons consuming the same ammo pool.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.5: Sands of Inaros
patchlogs.fixes:
Increased AoE damage of the Penta, Castanas series, Talons and Kulstar in Conclave.
Increased the lifetime of the Castanas series and Talons in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.10 & Tactial Alert: Divine Will
patchlogs.changes:
Removed the headshot multiplier from the Penta series, Castanas series, Kulstar, Talons and Angstrum in Conclave.
The Penta series, Castanas series, Kulstar, Talons and Angstrum’s explosive damage no longer ignores cover in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.0.6 + 18.0.6.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an error caused by players switching to the Talons, causing an incorrect visual FX showing the weapons as appearing from out of screen.

patchlogs.name: Update 18: The Second Dream
patchlogs.fixes: Talons: The claws of these tactical bombs dig into the target and detonate on command.
